name: Deskbot 005
name_jp: ブンボーグ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>０</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゼロ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>０</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゼロ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>５</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ファイブ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
You cannot Pendulum Summon monsters, except "Deskbot" monsters. This effect cannot be negated.

[ Monster Effect ] 
If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 Spell/Trap Card on the field; destroy it. This card gains 500 ATK for each face-up "Deskbot" monster in your Extra Deck. If this card in the Pendulum Zone is destroyed: You can target 1 "Deskbot" monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon it. You can only use this effect of "Deskbot 005" once per turn.
pend_eff: You cannot Pendulum Summon monsters, except "Deskbot" monsters. This effect cannot be negated.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 Spell/Trap Card on the field; destroy it. This card gains 500 ATK for each face-up "Deskbot" monster in your Extra Deck. If this card in the Pendulum Zone is destroyed: You can target 1 "Deskbot" monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon it. You can only use this effect of "Deskbot 005" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 Spell/Trap Card on the field; destroy it. This card gains 500 ATK for each face-up "Deskbot" monster in your Extra Deck. If this card in the Pendulum Zone is destroyed: You can target 1 "Deskbot" monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon it. You can only use this effect of "Deskbot 005" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Restricts the player's Pendulum Summons to archetype specific monsters
